comment: Trading card manifest. Source images live in C:/Slowpitch/Player Trading Cards (not committed). Add a new entry + run scripts/process_trading_cards.py then scripts/export_site_data.py when Brian mints a new card. kind: milestone|base. For milestone cards stat/value drive the generated game-day write-up.

cards.caption: First player in Tappers history to reach 125 hits
cards.flavor: First to 125 hits in team history. When the bat is on fire, ice storms are optional.

cards.caption: First player in Tappers history to reach 25 doubles
cards.flavor: First man in team history to 25 doubles — forged, not found. Somewhere in Cary there is an anvil with his name on it.

cards.caption: 3rd player in Tappers history to reach 20 doubles
cards.flavor: Twenty two-baggers, most of them arriving in a cloud of dirt. The Glove treats second base like it owes him money.

cards.caption: Second player on team with 15 home runs
cards.flavor: Fifteen bombs in a Tappers uniform. The center fielder never swings for the fences — the fences just keep getting in the way.

cards.caption: 4th player in Tappers history to reach 150 total bases
cards.flavor: 150 total bases, no wasted motion. PO out here under the streetlights making it look like a photoshoot — because it was.

cards.caption: 5th player in Tappers history to reach 100 hits
cards.flavor: One hundred hits, delivered on schedule. PO moves product and baserunners — warehouse hours, warehouse rules.

cards.caption: 5th player in Tappers history to reach 150 total bases
cards.flavor: A hundred and fifty bases, most of them taken the hard way. Rodger doesn't stop at first and he doesn't apologize at second.

cards.caption: 8th player in Tappers history to reach 50 runs
cards.flavor: Fifty times around the bases, achieved with monk-like patience. Tim doesn't chase runs — he lets them come to him.

cards.caption: 6th player in Tappers history to reach 50 RBIs
cards.flavor: Fifty runs batted in — and yes, he called it. 99-cent beers on Wednesdays, priceless RBIs year-round.

cards.caption: 7th player in Tappers history to reach 75 hits
cards.flavor: Seventy-five knocks for the franchise's steadiest bat. We can neither confirm nor deny the involvement of higher lifeforms.

cards.caption: 6th player in Tappers history to reach 50 runs
cards.flavor: Fifty trips home and a mud-soaked grin to show for it. Maki scores the way he slides — fully committed.

cards.caption: 8th player in Tappers history to reach 150 plate appearances
cards.flavor: 150 plate appearances unlocked. Level up. The catcher-turned-completionist grinds every count like a side quest.

cards.caption: 9th player in Tappers history to reach 50 runs
cards.flavor: Fifty runs scored — Walters crosses home like it's the Kentucky Derby, and the scoreboard agrees.

cards.caption: 14th player in Tappers history to reach 100 plate appearances
cards.flavor: One hundred plate appearances for the people's champ. Hot dog in one hand, cold one in the other, OBP somewhere in the cooler.

cards.caption: 15th player in Tappers history to reach 25 hits
cards.flavor: Twenty-five career hits and a carnival to celebrate every one. Walsh smiles because he knows the next one's coming.

cards.caption: Hit first 2 career home runs in Game 2 win versus the Bullseyes
cards.flavor: The Rauppy Dinger finally landed — then another one, same night. Two career firsts in a one-run win, and the fireworks budget has never recovered.

cards.caption: Topps Live Series
cards.flavor: Brings a whole bag of bats because pitchers keep breaking his heart, never his swing.

cards.caption: Topps Live Series
cards.flavor: Full extension, every play. JJ's glove has frequent-flyer miles.

cards.caption: Topps Live Series
cards.flavor: The vibes-per-plate-appearance leader since the day he showed up.

cards.caption: Topps Live Series
cards.flavor: Jason's Catching Station: throw it here. Response time may vary during ranked matches.

cards.caption: Prayers Up · Injured Reserve
cards.flavor: Down but not out. Joey took a valiant cannonball into a 4-foot pool and came up with a bruised knee — officially day-to-day, with a very real chance it's season-ending. The clubhouse lights a candle. Get well soon, Snaxx.

cards.caption: 2026 Summer · Week 1 Spotlight
cards.flavor: Sun, sand, and a series sweep. Rodger torched Como for a 6-for-8, home-run, 6-RBI opening week and walked off with Player of the Week honors. The beach never stood a chance.

cards.caption: 2026 Summer · Week 3 · Injury Update
cards.flavor: Rodger chased one into the outfield fence in Game 2 and the fence won. Carted off in the first inning with a bad ankle — one at-bat, then the beach chair. Day-to-day, and the whole clubhouse is pulling for him. Get well soon, Rodger.
facts: Ankle — ran into the outfield fence

cards.caption: 2026 Summer · Week 3 · First Career Ejection
cards.flavor: Maki made history — just not the kind that goes in the scorebook. Game 1 ended early when the umpire spotted a bottle of Hennessy holding down the bench. First career ejection in Tappers history, and the boys have never been prouder. Still our guy.
facts: Bottle of Hennessy on the bench

cards.caption: 1st player in Tappers history to reach 50 home runs
cards.flavor: Fifty bombs, and the first man in franchise history to get there. The bat flip was optional. The history was not.

cards.caption: 1st player in Tappers history to reach 125 runs
cards.flavor: 125 runs and counting — nobody in franchise history has crossed the plate more. The captain doesn't just lead the team; he leads it home.

cards.caption: 4th player in Tappers history to reach 75 games
cards.flavor: Seventy-five games in a Maple Tree uniform. Rain, shine, or otherwise, the captain answers the bell.

cards.caption: 3rd player in Tappers history to reach 75 singles
cards.flavor: Seventy-five singles, each one a quiet act of defiance against the box score. Maki just keeps finding grass.

cards.caption: 7th player in Tappers history to reach 50 RBI
cards.flavor: Fifty runs driven in. Maki doesn't ask who's on base — he just brings them home and asks questions later.

cards.caption: 4th player in Tappers history to reach 75 RBI
cards.flavor: Seventy-five RBI from the man who's usually diving on defense. Turns out JJ drives them in almost as often as he leaves his feet.

cards.caption: 3rd player in Tappers history to reach 100 runs
cards.flavor: One hundred runs scored. Get JJ on base and the scoreboard is a formality — he's cleared for takeoff.

cards.caption: 8th player in Tappers history to reach 50 singles
cards.flavor: Fifty career singles, unlocked. Walters grinds out base hits like achievements — one clean knock at a time.

cards.caption: 7th player in Tappers history to reach 200 at-bats
cards.flavor: Two hundred at-bats of blue-collar consistency. PO clocks in, moves the product, and clocks out.

cards.caption: 13th player in Tappers history to reach 100 at-bats
cards.flavor: One hundred career at-bats for the people's champ. Everybody gets here eventually — Snaxx just did it with a snack in hand.

cards.caption: 8th player in Tappers history to reach 75 hits
cards.flavor: Seventy-five career hits, audited and confirmed. The numbers never lie, and Tim's ledger keeps growing.
